title: acer oblongum var. omeiense
intro: Acer oblongum var. omeiense is a variety of the Acer oblongum plant, commonly known as the Omei Maple, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Acer oblongum var. omeiense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, Acer oblongum var. omeiense can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
